headline: Will Surging Marine Systems Backlog and Beat Q4 EPS Change General Dynamics' (GD) Narrative?
summary: In late 2025, General Dynamics reported fourth-quarter earnings per share of $4.17, surpassing consensus expectations as its Marine Systems segment delivered 21.7% revenue growth, 72.5% operating earnings improvement, and contributed to a total backlog of $178.94 billion that underscored long-term contract visibility. This combination of a very large backlog and strong Marine Systems momentum, alongside more optimistic analyst estimates, has sharpened attention on how upcoming earnings...
